A native race to the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Pantolomin/Legends|Pantolomin]], the '''Lomins''' were an [[Amphibian/Legends|amphibious]] race which shared the administrative duties within the [[Panto system]] with their neighbors, the [[Tolo]]s.
